exact_cases.en: The job flag --checkpoint-complete-fault-event-id inserts a test-only operator immediately upstream of the Iceberg sinks. After the trigger event is observed, the operator throws once from CheckpointListener.notifyCheckpointComplete; Iceberg sink commits are driven by the same checkpoint-complete phase.
exact_cases.zh: 作业参数 --checkpoint-complete-fault-event-id 会在 Iceberg sink 上游紧邻位置插入一个仅测试用的算子。触发事件被观测到后，该算子从 CheckpointListener.notifyCheckpointComplete 抛出一次异常；Iceberg sink 的提交由同一 checkpoint-complete 阶段驱动。

Olist Parquet 的周键无效。

reverse_cases.zh: Olist Parquet 须将最后 8 个观测周精确保留为留出期。
reverse_cases.en: Olist Parquet must reserve exactly the final eight observed weeks as holdout.

reverse_cases.zh: Olist 精简预览包含超出已记录策略范围的行。

reverse_cases.zh: Olist 精简预览未绑定到已记录的制品 SHA-256。
reverse_cases.en: Olist compact preview is not bound to the recorded artifact SHA-256.

reverse_cases.zh: Olist 精简预览未绑定到已记录预览行的 SHA-256。
reverse_cases.en: Olist compact preview is not bound to the recorded preview-row SHA-256.

reverse_cases.zh: Olist 精简预览的各行数据与其可信 SHA-256 不匹配。

reverse_cases.en: Olist compact preview row count drifted.

reverse_cases.zh: Olist 精简预览的负载与其可信 SHA-256 不匹配。
reverse_cases.en: Olist compact preview payload does not match its trusted SHA-256.

reverse_cases.zh: Olist 精简预览缺少其引导行。
reverse_cases.en: Olist compact preview is missing its guided row.

reverse_cases.zh: Olist 精简预览缺少完整制品合约证据。
reverse_cases.en: Olist compact preview is missing the full-artifact contract evidence.

reverse_cases.zh: Olist 紧凑预览的元组宽度出现漂移。
reverse_cases.en: Olist compact preview tuple width drifted.

reverse_cases.zh: Olist 紧凑预览的源标识与获取到的产物不一致。
